title: cassia andreana
intro: Cassia andreana, also known as Senna andreana, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant's leaves and pods contain anthraquinone glycosides, which have been used for their medicinal properties, including as a laxative and to treat digestive issues. The health benefits of Cassia andreana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Cassia andreana is commonly prepared in herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to alleviate various health concerns, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes.
